detectors.description:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract AetherRouter (src/router/AetherRouter.sol#24-383) has payable functions:
	 - AetherRouter.receive() (src/router/AetherRouter.sol#382)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether
detectors.markdown:
Contract locking ether found:
	Contract [AetherRouter](src/router/AetherRouter.sol#L24-L383) has payable functions:
	 - [AetherRouter.receive()](src/router/AetherRouter.sol#L382)
	But does not have a function to withdraw the ether

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in AetherFactory.createPool(address,address,uint24,int24,uint160) (src/factory/AetherFactory.sol#62-91):
	External calls:
	- tick = poolManager.initialize(key,sqrtPriceX96) (src/factory/AetherFactory.sol#88)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- PoolCreated(poolId,msg.sender,token0,token1,fee,tickSpacing,sqrtPriceX96,tick) (src/factory/AetherFactory.sol#90)
detectors.markdown:
